occupation_title: Extruding and Drawing Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Metal and Plastic
occupation_definition: Set up, operate, or tend machines to extrude or draw thermoplastic or metal materials into tubes, rods, hoses, wire, bars, or structural shapes.
